evidence.claim: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature store
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Developed churn prediction model used by customer success team
evidence.source_text: My main project was a churn prediction model that's now used by the customer success team to prioritize outreach.

evidence.claim: Designed model monitoring stack including data drift and distribution checks
evidence.source_text: Designed the model monitoring stack: data drift detection, prediction distribution checks, and alerting.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through an end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Built content recommendation system serving 10M+ users
evidence.source_text: Built a content recommendation system serving 10M+ users

evidence.claim: Improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%
evidence.source_text: The launch improved 7-day retention by 6% and time spent per session by 14%.
Most of my time went into the feature pipeline (~200 features)

evidence.claim: Led team migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over theoretical learning
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.

evidence.claim: Proficient in wide range of ML tools including Transformers, Elasticsearch, Diffusion Models, FastAPI, TensorFlow, Weaviate
evidence.source_text: Skills: Embeddings, Hugging Face Transformers, Elasticsearch, Diffusion Models, Forecasting, FastAPI, Prompt Engineering, LLMs, Python, MLOps, TensorFlow, Weaviate, Vector Search, Recommendation Systems, OpenSearch, Computer Vision
